# Self-reference rule

This repository's content is published to `https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/architecture/...`. While editing an article in this repo, you are not allowed to use that article's own published Learn page as a grounding source.

If a search or fetch returns a URL under `learn.microsoft.com/<locale>/azure/architecture/` that corresponds to the article being edited in this repo, drop it from consideration. Grounding on it is circular and by definition is stale data.

## What to ground on instead

Use any other Microsoft Learn page, including those found elsewhere in this repo.

If the only relevant Learn hit is this page, you have to tell the user you couldn't find independent grounding.
